note: All numbers from Bitcoin Core bench_bitcoin binary — real Bitcoin Core validation pipeline. NOT bench_unified. Medians of ≥3 stable runs; outliers excluded when CPU thermal spike detected (>10% deviation).

results_nolto.note: Release without LTO. Medians from ≥3 stable runs (i5-14400F, performance governor, turbo off, taskset -c 0).
results_nolto.build: SECP256K1_BUILD_SHIM=ON (shim compiled into engine, ODR-safe stub wrapper)

test_suite.note: 749/749 Bitcoin Core unit tests pass with Ultra backend

nolto_gap_root_cause.finding: ConnectBlock -3% without LTO is a binary code layout artifact — NOT from secp256k1 operations.
evidence: VerifyScriptP2WPKH (pubkey_parse + sig_parse + ecdsa_verify): ultra ≈ libsecp (ratio 1.01) — secp256k1 ops are at parity
VerifyScriptP2TR_KeyPath (xonly_parse + schnorr_verify): ultra 1.03x FASTER than libsecp
ConnectBlock -3% gap: 6.5ms over 2500 txns = 2.6µs/tx extra NOT in VerifyScript hot path
SECP256K1_UNITY_BUILD=ON (single-TU, libsecp model): ConnectBlock ratio unchanged at 0.97
With LTO: ConnectBlock ratio = 1.00 (gap eliminated by linker global layout optimization)
nolto_gap_root_cause.root_cause: Linking a different library changes Bitcoin Core's own binary code layout. Hot functions in the non-secp256k1 path (CCheckQueue, UTXO loop) land at different memory addresses, causing L1 instruction-cache hit rate variation of ±3%. LTO eliminates this by performing a global layout pass across all translation units.
nolto_gap_root_cause.not_fixable_in: secp256k1 code — this is a linker layout artifact intrinsic to non-LTO builds
nolto_gap_root_cause.recommendation: Use LTO for production builds (-DCMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION=ON). For non-LTO builds, the 3% gap is a known acceptable trade-off: signing is 14-32% faster, verify paths equal or faster.

known_limitations: ConnectBlock -3% without LTO: binary code layout artifact from linking different library sizes; LTO eliminates it. NOT from secp256k1 operation latency (VerifyScript is at parity or faster).
BIP324 ECDH: 2% within noise margin (no optimized CT ECDH for this path yet)
